title: REPL Demo Loop
interaction_flow: User → run_demo_loop: [loop starts] prompt ' > ' shown via input()
User → run_demo_loop: types user input string (or 'exit'/'quit'/EOF/Ctrl-D to stop)
run_demo_loop → run_demo_loop: append {'role':'user','content':user_input} to input_items list
run_demo_loop → Runner: run_streamed(current_agent, input=input_items, context=context, max_turns=max_turns) [if stream=True]
Runner → run_demo_loop: returns RunResultStreaming (synchronous, background run_loop_task started)
run_demo_loop → RunResultStreaming: stream_events() [async for loop]
RunResultStreaming → run_demo_loop: yields StreamEvent items from _event_queue
[branch] RawResponsesStreamEvent + data is ResponseTextDeltaEvent → Console: print(event.data.delta, end='', flush=True) [token-by-token streaming]
[branch] RunItemStreamEvent + item.type=='tool_call_item' → Console: print('\n[tool called]')
[branch] RunItemStreamEvent + item.type=='tool_call_output_item' → Console: print(f'\n[tool output: {event.item.output}]')
[branch] AgentUpdatedStreamEvent → Console: print(f'\n[Agent updated: {event.new_agent.name}]')
RunResultStreaming → run_demo_loop: async iterator exhausted (QueueCompleteSentinel received, is_complete=True)
run_demo_loop → Console: print() [newline after streamed response]
run_demo_loop → RunResultStreaming: result.last_agent → current_agent updated (tracks handoffs)
run_demo_loop → RunResultStreaming: result.to_input_list() → input_items updated (preserves full conversation history)
run_demo_loop → run_demo_loop: [loop back to prompt]
--- non-streaming branch (stream=False) ---
run_demo_loop → Runner: await Runner.run(current_agent, input_items, context=context, max_turns=max_turns)
Runner → run_demo_loop: returns RunResult
run_demo_loop → Console: print(result.final_output) [if not None]
--- exit conditions ---
User → run_demo_loop: EOFError or KeyboardInterrupt → print() + break
User → run_demo_loop: input 'exit' or 'quit' → break
User → run_demo_loop: empty input → continue (skip, re-prompt)
stream_events_internals: RunResultStreaming._event_queue: asyncio.Queue[StreamEvent | QueueCompleteSentinel] — background run_loop_task writes events here
stream_events() loop: checks _check_errors() each iteration (MaxTurnsExceeded, GuardrailTripwireTriggered)
QueueCompleteSentinel received → awaits _input_guardrails_task, checks errors, breaks loop
On cancel (asyncio.CancelledError): calls self.cancel() → _cleanup_tasks(), is_complete=True, drains queues
Post-loop cleanup: awaits run_loop_task, drains event queue and guardrail queue, raises _stored_exception if set

key_classes.run_demo_loop: async def in repl.py; params: agent: Agent[Any], stream=True, context: TContext|None, max_turns=DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS
key_classes.RunResultStreaming: dataclass extends RunResultBase; fields: current_agent, current_turn, max_turns, final_output, is_complete, _event_queue, run_loop_task, interruptions
key_classes.RunResultBase: abstract dataclass; fields: input, new_items, raw_responses, final_output, guardrail results, context_wrapper; methods: to_input_list(), last_agent (abstract), final_output_as()
key_classes.RunResult: non-streaming concrete result; fields: _last_agent, interruptions, to_state()
key_classes.RawResponsesStreamEvent: dataclass; data: TResponseStreamEvent (OpenAI Responses API format); type='raw_response_event'
key_classes.RunItemStreamEvent: dataclass; name: Literal[...event names...]; item: RunItem; type='run_item_stream_event'

key_relationships: run_demo_loop uses RunResultStreaming (calls stream_events(), accesses last_agent, to_input_list())
RunResultStreaming extends RunResultBase (inherits to_input_list, final_output_as, etc.)
RunResultStreaming contains asyncio.Queue for StreamEvent delivery
run_demo_loop maintains input_items list (conversation history) across turns
run_demo_loop tracks current_agent (updated after each turn via result.last_agent)
important_notes: Conversation history persists across turns: input_items accumulates turn-by-turn via result.to_input_list()
current_agent tracks handoffs: result.last_agent may differ from starting agent after a handoff
stream=True is default; stream=False path uses await Runner.run() and prints result.final_output
Token streaming: RawResponsesStreamEvent with ResponseTextDeltaEvent provides character-level deltas
Exit: 'exit'/'quit' string, empty Enter (skip/continue), EOFError (Ctrl-D), or KeyboardInterrupt (Ctrl-C)
RunResultStreaming raises MaxTurnsExceeded or GuardrailTripwireTriggered from stream_events() if triggered
PrintableEvent is not a distinct class — repl.py handles event types inline with isinstance/type checks
run_loop_task is a background asyncio.Task started by Runner.run_streamed; stream_events() drives it to completion
